facebook-scrape.summary: Scraped Facebook (9:12 AM ET Mar 31). No new activity since last run (11:15 AM UTC). Notifications still at 18 — only new item is HVAC Business Owners welcome mention at 9:04 AM ET (auto-welcome post, not a Novaro post or lead). Checked USA Car Detailing Services post directly — 0 comments. Activity log: 5 posts from Mar 30 at 11 PM ET confirmed in log (Junk Removal Winners, USA Car Detailing, Pressure Washing Business Owners, Pro Window Cleaning, Window Cleaning Newbies). No new Novaro posts today. Messenger inbox unchanged: Brady Fellows, Byron Peabody, Anthony Cocchi (3d ago), Ann Giroux (unread E2EE, same as before) — no new DM threads. Spam tags noted from Paul Henry Aguirre (Roofing group), Bil Gates (Painters Near Me), Paul Smith (Plumbers Talk), Superior Commercial Cleaning LLC, Berry Little — none are leads. All totals unchanged: 113 comments, 38 positive, 2 DMs, 12 interest signals, 16 groups, 18 posts live. March 31 daily unchanged: 4 posts, 2 comments, 1 positive, 1 DM, 1 interest signal.

Unread filter confirms 'No unread messages' — (1) badge is LinkedIn system/sponsored message only. 21 incoming invitations on Grow page unchanged. Today's total requests: 57 (28 earlier batch + 29 this batch).
